description: Maps knowledge-base concepts and rule families to task classes for Step 6 deterministic labeling. Partial/heuristic mappings are explicit; many corpus rules remain out of scope for v1.

mappings.rationale: Stop/level rules in corpus describe interaction with price levels; multiclass satisfaction is resolved from bars, not rule text.
mappings.notes: Does not map directly to a single class — narrows eligible pattern families.

mappings.rationale: Breakout/retest vocabulary aligns with acceptance vs false-breakout semantics.
mappings.notes: Directional split (up/down) comes from approach direction + bar path.

mappings.rationale: Accumulation contexts often imply range boundaries; level interactions may be no_setup or rejection without clean breakout.
mappings.notes: Lower prior for strong acceptance labels unless Step 6 range-break rules fire.

mappings.rationale: Core level-interaction ontology for this task_id.
mappings.notes: Primary in-scope concept family for v1.

excluded_rule_families.reason: Pedagogical slides without tradeable level anchor — out of scope for bar-based task.
No level interaction definition — deferred to future tasks.
Not a level-interaction pattern — excluded from task_id level_interaction_rule_satisfaction_v1.
